task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 04-6-027 Printhead calibration dates [Special Tests]

section.title: Function
section.p: This test shows the calibration dates (yyyymmdd) of all printheads.

If 0 is shown the printhead is not calibrated (completely). A not calibrated printhead can not print correctly. A calibration with SDS 04-6-026 must be executed. Printhead calibrations executed via the operating panel are not visible via this test.
If -1 is shown the printhead is disabled.

note.p: Printing is blocked by a red tool tile on the operator panel, in case one or more printheads are not fully calibrated.
